title: BLOCKING: confirm facts licensable + credit line + image decision for each exemplar object
context: No description may be drafted until a license prerequisite is confirmed for each exemplar object. This task is explicitly BLOCKING for exemplar-001: before any plain-language description is written, the maintainer/license reviewer must confirm and record (a) the facts are licensable for a derivative plain-language description, (b) the required verbatim attribution/credit line, and (c) the image rights decision. Any object that cannot be confirmed is rejected and replaced with another openly-licensed object.
objective: For each chosen exemplar object, research and record: (a) that the facts/text are licensable for a derivative plain-language description (open license or written grant — confirmed, not assumed); (b) the required verbatim attribution/credit line as specified by the source; (c) the image rights decision (include with verified compatible license, or exclude). Record findings in each object's object.yaml and produce a summary license-prerequisite document. exemplar-001 must not start until this task passes for all chosen objects.
acceptanceCriteria: For each exemplar object: confirms in writing that the facts/text are licensable for a derivative plain-language description, citing the specific open license or grant
For each exemplar object: records the required verbatim attribution/credit line exactly as specified by the source
For each exemplar object: records the image rights decision (include with licence URL and holder, or exclude with reason); does not assume an image is freely licensed without explicit verification
Any object that cannot be confirmed for all three items is rejected and a replacement openly-licensed object is selected and confirmed instead
Results recorded in each object.yaml's factsRights and imageRights blocks and in a summary license-prerequisite document committed to the repo
exemplar-001 is explicitly unblocked only after this task is complete and accepted
resources: multilingual-museum-labels-rights-001 (rights model — must be in place)
Wikimedia Commons / Wikidata GLAM open data (candidate exemplar sources)
output: docs/license-prerequisite.md — per-object license confirmation record; object.yaml factsRights and imageRights populated for each exemplar object
